description: Complete catalog of MCP tools, agent skills, and library references for CTO platform agents. Query this to discover available capabilities, tools, and documentation.
rules: Skills are SKILL.md files containing agent instructions and domain knowledge
Tools are MCP servers documented in tools-catalog/tools/ with capabilities, schemas, and config
Use skill-mappings.yaml for agent-to-skill assignments by job type
Use llm-docs-registry.yaml for library documentation sources and Context7 IDs
tools-catalog/catalog.json provides a machine-readable index of all tools and their capabilities
When searching for a capability, check both tools-catalog/tools/ and rex/_default/ skills
Prefer generating custom skills from Context7 library docs over installing third-party skills
